page_metadata.biotools__summary: Software for finding tag SNPs. It is compared with existing methods as well as the official tagging tool (called Haploview) of the International HapMap project using a variety of real data sets.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Software for finding tag SNPs. It is compared with existing methods as well as the official tagging tool (called Haploview) of the International HapMap project using a variety of real data sets.
